data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a fair distribution algorithm, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this algorithm, leading to a clear gap in the requirement. The absence of checks or validations related to the distribution of notifications among substitutes indicates that the requirement is not covered.
gaps: No evidence of a fair distribution algorithm being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for fair distribution algorithm
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the fair distribution of notifications among substitutes.
